name: Liu Kui

sections.short-biography: Supported Tao Qian’s unsuccessful petition for Zhu Jun to attack Li Jue.

full_text:
Liu Kui
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Kui. Supported Tao Qian’s unsuccessful petition for Zhu Jun to attack Li Jue. Liu Kui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Tao Qian.
